nav.pin_study: Pin a study for quick access.

home.title: Home
home.lede: One place for every active study, draft, and decision.

first_study_hero.title: Design your first study.
first_study_hero.body: Merism recruits, interviews, codes, and reports on one focused research question end-to-end.

studies.title: Studies
studies.lede: Everything you're learning about your users.
studies.empty_hero_body: A study is one focused line of research. Merism recruits, interviews, codes, and reports on it end-to-end.

create_study.title: New Study
create_study.description: Tell us what you want to learn. AI will generate a complete discussion guide for you.
create_study.research_goal_placeholder: e.g. Why do advanced users cancel after day 14?
create_study.research_goal_hint: Write it as a question your team would ask in a meeting.
create_study.context_placeholder: Background info about your product, audience, or what the AI should know...
create_study.context_hint: The more context you provide, the better the generated guide will be.

guide.interview_method_hint: How participants will respond to the interview.
guide.allow_fallback_chat: Allow participants to switch to chat if their camera/microphone is not working.
guide.intro_message_hint: This will be shown as the first message from the AI interviewer.
guide.context_for_ai_hint: Background information to help the AI conduct a better interview.
guide.ai_companion_description: Describe your research goals and AI will generate a structured discussion guide.

overview.draft_title: Your study is ready to configure
overview.draft_body: Head to the Guide tab to set up your interview method, questions, and AI context. Once configured, you can recruit participants and start collecting responses.
overview.activity_empty: Activity will appear here once interviews begin.

results.empty_body: Results will appear here once interviews are completed. AI will automatically extract themes, codes, and key quotes.

ask.title: Ask Merism
ask.lede: A conversational co-researcher across your entire workspace.
ask.empty_hero_title: What do you want to know?
ask.empty_hero_body: Ask questions across every study, session, and quote. Merism searches the knowledge base and cites sources inline.
suggestions: What do participants say about pricing?
ask.placeholder: Ask Merism anything about your research…
ask.saved_coming_soon: Pin your favourite answers to re-run them later.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.lede: New responses, notifications, and signals across your studies.
inbox.empty_body: New session completions, channel alerts, and @-mentions will land here.

repository.title: Repository
repository.lede: Every quote, theme, and artefact — searchable across studies.
repository.empty_body: As studies complete, Merism indexes every quote and code for cross-study search.

decisions.title: Decisions
decisions.lede: Action items extracted from research, tracked to close.
decisions.empty_body: Action items from completed sessions appear here with evidence links.

settings.title: Settings
settings.lede: Workspace, team, and your account preferences.

workspace.title: Workspace details
workspace.members_description: Team members with access to this workspace.
workspace.members_body: Member management lands with the first multi-tenant rollout.
workspace.compliance_body: PIPL-aligned. Raw transcripts kept server-side; clean-verbatim exports available from any session.

login.heading: Welcome back.
login.sub: Sign in to your research workspace.

interview.session_ended: Thank you. Your session is complete.
interview.session_ended_body: Your response has been recorded. You may close this window.

errors.not_found_body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.
